creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Thomas Guymer from comment #3)
On stable/14-ccd9c1ef4e90:

For nvidia-driver-470:
nvidia-driver-470 is missing a required shared library: libthr.so.3:32
nvidia-driver-470 is missing a required shared library: libnvidia-tls.so.1:32
nvidia-driver-470 is missing a required shared library: libm.so.5:32
nvidia-driver-470 is missing a required shared library: libc.so.7:32
nvidia-driver-470 is missing a required shared library: libXext.so.6:32
nvidia-driver-470 is missing a required shared library: libX11.so.6:32
And Quadro K600 doesn't work.


But for nvidia-driver I've got same errors
nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libthr.so.3:32
nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libnvidia-tls.so.1:32
nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libm.so.5:32
nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libc.so.7:32
nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libXext.so.6:32
nvidia-driver is missing a required shared library: libX11.so.6:32
But GT 1030 works success.
